plugins.name: agent-memory
plugins.description: GitHub-backed persistent memory for Claude Code. Syncs agent memory across machines via a private Git repository.

plugins.name: gema-kube-agents
plugins.description: stdio MCP server + /kube-agents skill for the kube-agents platform agent (Gemini Managed Agents Interactions API path). Live tool-call narration + GCS audit transcripts.

plugins.name: kagent-kube-agents
plugins.description: stdio MCP server for the kagent platform-agent running on GKE. Communicates via A2A JSON-RPC. Auto-starts kubectl port-forward.

plugins.name: memory-bank
plugins.description: GCP-backed long-term memory for Claude Code. Fetches global and project-scoped facts from Vertex AI Reasoning Engine Memory Bank at session start; consolidates new facts at session end.

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: OKF v0.1 knowledge bundle manager. Author, ingest, lint, query, and visualize Open Knowledge Format bundles. Implements the Karpathy LLM-wiki pattern with BigQuery and web ingest adapters.

plugins.name: antigravity-review
plugins.description: Code review via Google Antigravity. An agy-code-reviewer subagent and /agy-review command assemble a git diff plus context into a review brief and send it to the Antigravity CLI (agy --print) for a second-opinion review.
